content: Procedure VNADSPRD performs operations: TRUNCATE, INSERT, TRUNCATE, INSERT.
Truncates table vnadsprd.IEN_MARKET_INPUT_LIST_STG before data load.
Inserts into vnadsprd.IEN_MARKET_INPUT_LIST_STG from sources vnadsprd.NAUT_TRAIL, vnadsprd.NAUT_TRAIL_ELEMENT.
Truncates table vnadsprd.IEN_MARKET_INPUT_LIST before data load.
Inserts into vnadsprd.IEN_MARKET_INPUT_LIST from sources vnadsprd.ICOE_SITE_TBL, vnadsprd.IEN_UT_PMO_TRACKER, vnadsprd.icoe_pvnr_t_logical_port, vnadsprd.ICOE_EQUIPMENT_TBL.

Columns inserted into vnadsprd.IEN_MARKET_INPUT_LIST_STG: TRAIL_ID, TRAIL_NAME, STATUS, TYPE, VERSION, SEQUENCE, PORT_REFERENCE_ID, SOURCE, CHANNEL_NAME, SEQUENCE_NUMBER, PORT_STATUS, ELEMENT_TYPE, NF_ID, ACLLI, ZCLLI, LAST_REFRESHED_TS
Columns inserted into vnadsprd.IEN_MARKET_INPUT_LIST: TRAIL_ID, MARKET_NAME, MARKET_STATE, CLLI, TRAIL_NAME, TID_LOGICAL, ALTERNATE_NAME, NFID, CREATED_TS
